notes: First launch after download and installation froze on a black screen.  Second launch started slow but then worked very well.  I was able to complete a mission with no problems.  I shut down and restarted the game and it once again launched successfully and I was able to complete another challenge.  Seems to work fine.
title: New Gundam Breaker

notes: Initial opening of the game breaks then relaunch after the shaders have been started. The games runs at full speed and is stable as far as I am aware.
title: New Gundam Breaker
